entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `username` TEXT NOT NULL, `avatar` TEXT, `isPrivate` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `time` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `xp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rr` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`id`, `userId`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `agent` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `ownedState` TEXT NOT NULL, `startTime` TEXT, `endTime` TEXT, `xpOffset` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalXp` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`, `agent`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`agent`) REFERENCES `valo_agents`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `hasOnboarded` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`follower` TEXT NOT NULL, `following` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `relationStatus` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`follower`, `following`), FOREIGN KEY(`follower`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`following`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `scoreA` INTEGER NOT NULL, `scoreB` INTEGER, `endReason` TEXT NOT NULL, `isRanked` INTEGER NOT NULL, `map` TEXT NOT NULL, `mode` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`), FOREIGN KEY(`map`) REFERENCES `valo_maps`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`mode`) REFERENCES `valo_modes`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `activity` TEXT NOT NULL, `match` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `isOwner` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isTeamB` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`, `activity`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`activity`, `userId`) REFERENCES `activities`(`id`, `userId`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`match`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `progression` TEXT NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `updatedAt` TEXT NOT NULL, `freeOnly` INTEGER NOT NULL, `trackXp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `startTime` TEXT, `endTime` TEXT, `xpOffset` INTEGER NOT NULL, `totalXp` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`, `progression`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`progression`) REFERENCES `valo_progressions`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId` TEXT NOT NULL, `progression` TEXT NOT NULL, `levelIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `createdAt` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`userId`, `progression`, `levelIndex`), FOREIGN KEY(`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`progression`, `levelIndex`) REFERENCES `valo_progression_levels`(`progression`, `levelIndex`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`agent` TEXT NOT NULL, `slot` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`agent`, `slot`), FOREIGN KEY(`agent`) REFERENCES `valo_agents`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `developerName` TEXT NOT NULL, `releaseDate` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIconSmall` TEXT NOT NULL, `bustPortrait` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullPortrait` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullPortraitV2` TEXT NOT NULL, `killfeedPortrait` TEXT NOT NULL, `minimapPortrait` TEXT NOT NULL, `homeScreenPromoTileImage` TEXT, `background` TEXT NOT NULL, `backgroundGradientColors` TEXT NOT NULL, `isFullPortraitRightFacing` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isBaseContent` INTEGER NOT NULL, `role` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`role`) REFERENCES `valo_agent_roles`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`agent` TEXT NOT NULL, `xp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `startTime` TEXT NOT NULL, `endTime` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`agent`), FOREIGN KEY(`agent`) REFERENCES `valo_agents`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `parent` TEXT NOT NULL, `theme` TEXT, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `charmLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `hideIfNotOwned` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`theme`) REFERENCES `valo_themes`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `theme` TEXT, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `largeArt` TEXT, `wideArt` TEXT NOT NULL, `smallArt` TEXT NOT NULL, `hideIfNotOwned` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`theme`) REFERENCES `valo_themes`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `competitiveSeason` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `smallIcon` TEXT, `level` INTEGER NOT NULL, `winsRequired` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`competitiveSeason`) REFERENCES `valo_competitive_seasons`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `season` TEXT NOT NULL, `rankTable` TEXT NOT NULL, `startTime` TEXT NOT NULL, `endTime` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`season`) REFERENCES `valo_seasons`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`rankTable`) REFERENCES `valo_rank_tables`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `developerName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `juiceCost` INTEGER NOT NULL, `juiceValue` INTEGER NOT NULL, `highlightColor` TEXT NOT NULL, `rank` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayNameSingular` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `largeIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `rewardPreviewIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT, `shortDisplayName` TEXT, `startTime` TEXT NOT NULL, `endTime` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayNameAllCaps` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `tacticalDescription` TEXT, `coordinates` TEXT, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `listViewIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `listViewIconTall` TEXT NOT NULL, `splash` TEXT NOT NULL, `premierBackgroundImage` TEXT, `stylizedBackgroundImage` TEXT, `displayIcon` TEXT, `xMultiplier` REAL NOT NULL, `xScalarToAdd` REAL NOT NULL, `yMultiplier` REAL NOT NULL, `yScalarToAdd` REAL NOT NULL, `callouts` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `description` TEXT, `duration` TEXT, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, `listViewIconTall` TEXT, `roundsPerHalf` INTEGER NOT NULL, `canBeRanked` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, `relationType` TEXT, `relationUuid` TEXT, `premiumVpCost` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`progression` TEXT NOT NULL, `levelIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `xp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isPurchasableVp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isPurchasableKc` INTEGER NOT NULL, `vpCost` INTEGER NOT NULL, `kcCost` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isEpilogue` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`progression`, `levelIndex`), FOREIGN KEY(`progression`) REFERENCES `valo_progressions`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`progression` TEXT NOT NULL, `levelIndex` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sortOrder` INTEGER NOT NULL, `relationType` TEXT NOT NULL, `relationUuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `amount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isFree` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`progression`, `levelIndex`, `sortOrder`), FOREIGN KEY(`progression`, `levelIndex`) REFERENCES `valo_progression_levels`(`progression`, `levelIndex`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`rankTable` TEXT NOT NULL, `tier` INTEGER NOT NULL, `tierName` TEXT NOT NULL, `smallIcon` TEXT, `largeIcon` TEXT, `rankTriangleDownIcon` TEXT, `rankTriangleUpIcon` TEXT, `color` TEXT NOT NULL, `backgroundColor` TEXT NOT NULL, `division` TEXT NOT NULL, `divisionName` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`rankTable`, `tier`), FOREIGN KEY(`rankTable`) REFERENCES `valo_rank_tables`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `episodeDisplayName` TEXT, `title` TEXT, `startTime` TEXT NOT NULL, `endTime` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `theme` TEXT, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `fullIcon` TEXT, `fullTransparentIcon` TEXT, `animationPng` TEXT, `animationGif` TEXT, `hideIfNotOwned` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`theme`) REFERENCES `valo_themes`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, `storeFeaturedImage` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT, `titleText` TEXT, `hideIfNotOwned` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `branch` TEXT NOT NULL, `buildVersion` TEXT NOT NULL, `manifestId` TEXT NOT NULL, `riotClientBuild` TEXT NOT NULL, `riotClientVersion` TEXT NOT NULL, `engineVersion` TEXT NOT NULL, `version` TEXT NOT NULL, `buildDate` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `defaultSkin` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, `killStreamIcon` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`weapon` TEXT NOT NULL, `cost` INTEGER NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `shopOrderPriority` INTEGER NOT NULL, `categoryText` TEXT NOT NULL, `gridPosition` TEXT, `canBeTrashed` INTEGER NOT NULL, `image` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`weapon`), FOREIGN KEY(`weapon`) REFERENCES `valo_weapons`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `skin` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, `fullRender` TEXT NOT NULL, `swatch` TEXT, `streamedVideo` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`skin`) REFERENCES `valo_weapon_skins`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `weapon` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `theme` TEXT NOT NULL, `contentTier` TEXT, `displayIcon` TEXT, `wallpaper` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`weapon`) REFERENCES `valo_weapons`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`theme`) REFERENCES `valo_themes`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`contentTier`) REFERENCES `valo_content_tiers`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`uuid` TEXT NOT NULL, `skin` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayName` TEXT NOT NULL, `displayIcon` TEXT, `streamedVideo` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`uuid`), FOREIGN KEY(`skin`) REFERENCES `valo_weapon_skins`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`weapon` TEXT NOT NULL, `fireRate` REAL NOT NULL, `magazineSize` INTEGER NOT NULL, `runSpeedMultiplier` REAL NOT NULL, `equipTimeSeconds` REAL NOT NULL, `reloadTimeSeconds` REAL NOT NULL, `firstBulletAccuracy` REAL NOT NULL, `shotgunPelletCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `wallPenetration` TEXT NOT NULL, `feature` TEXT, `fireMode` TEXT, `altFireType` TEXT, `adsStats` TEXT, `altShotgunStats` TEXT, `airBurstStats` TEXT, `damageRanges` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`weapon`), FOREIGN KEY(`weapon`) REFERENCES `valo_weapons`(`uuid`) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE )

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '97b37af3588264c426e9979bbcaeb02e')
